quickTexts.name: Complete AI HPI Intake
quickTexts.english: Please complete a brief AI chat session for {{patient-first-name}} to help your provider prepare for your visit: {{ai-interview-url}}
quickTexts.spanish: Por favor complete una breve sesión de chat con IA para {{patient-first-name}} para ayudar a su proveedor a prepararse para su visita: {{ai-interview-url}}

quickTexts.name: Complete Paperwork
quickTexts.english: Please complete the paperwork and sign consent forms to avoid a delay in check-in. For {{patient-first-name}}, click here: {{paperwork-url}}
quickTexts.spanish: Complete la documentación y firme los formularios de consentimiento para evitar demoras en el registro. Para {{patient-first-name}}, haga clic aquí: {{paperwork-url}}

quickTexts.name: Ready to be seen
quickTexts.english: We are ready for the patient to be seen, please enter the facility.
quickTexts.spanish: Estamos listos para atender al paciente; ingrese al centro.

quickTexts.name: Trying to reach you
quickTexts.english: {{practice-name}} is trying to get a hold of you. Please call us at {{office-phone}} or respond to this text message.
quickTexts.spanish: {{practice-name}} está intentando comunicarse con usted. Llámenos al {{office-phone}} o responda a este mensaje de texto.
